message:
feat(db): exact-expiry guard for force_release_reservation, cache test borrow fixes

Introduce ReleaseReservationExpiryConstraint enum (Any / OnOrBefore /
Exact) so force_release_reservation uses an exact expires_ts match
instead of a <= cutoff.  This prevents a race where a concurrent renewal
changes expires_ts to a *later* value that still passes the old cutoff
check, silently releasing a reservation that was just renewed.

The existing release_reservations_by_ids_matching_expiry helper
continues to use OnOrBefore for normal expiry sweeps — only the
force-release path switches to Exact.

Add a targeted test (force_release_reservation_requires_exact_expiry_match)
that mutates expires_ts downward and verifies the guard rejects the
stale timestamp.

In cache.rs tests, clone the Arc out of the lock guard before dropping
it to satisfy the borrow checker (the previous code held a reference
into the guard while also trying to drop the guard).

In search_v3.rs, move the LAST_MEASURED static declaration above its
first use for readability.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
